text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Aaaah! Cute Curren Chaaaaan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a part of the academy's PR efforts, today's
training is open to the public. Curren Chan is as
popular as ever, but...

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Uh... I came here 'cause I can, but I really don't
get what's going on...

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Me neither. I barely watch races anyway. Wanna
head out?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Ehe! ♪ I've got it!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, can we change up the order a bit? I wanna
do those thirty hell sprints right now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, can we change up the order a bit? I wanna
do those thirty hell sprints right now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Weeell, I thought I'd give everyone the okay to
film it. And then...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Time to start Curren Chan's Thirty Sprint
Challenge! ☆

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Wooo! You got this, Curren!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yahhh!

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Wonder what's going on over there. Whoa! Look
how fast she is! That's crazy!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... All done! And I hit my target time! Mission accomplished! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehe, and it's all thanks to all of your cheers! ♪ That's right, you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Even after all those sprints... she smiles like an angel! And she's already trending on Umastagram!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ah. ♪ Were you two cheering for me as well?

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: Oh! Uh, um... You're so fast!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! ☆ Thanks! ♪ If you're interested in racing,
be sure to check me out! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh! And since we got to meet today... why don't we shake hands? Squeeeze!

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: S-so cute! I didn't know racers could be this cute!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Y-your name's Curren Chan, right?! C-can you
shake my hand too?!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, I'm so jealous!
I want a handshake too!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Really? That makes me so happy! ♪ This was
supposed to be a surprise, but actually...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna do a meet and greet with everyone
after training! Will you all come and shake my
hand then?

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Really?!
I'm so there!
I love you, Curren!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll make sure to finish training early so I can
shake hands with everyone! Thanks for your
support. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Kyaaa! Yay!
You're so cute! Cute Curren Chan!
choice_data_list:
You've got them eating out of the palm of your
hands!

You've got them eating out of the palm of your
hands!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. A little teasing gets the OG fans excited. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's like she planned everything from the start! She
ends up winning over new fans while making her
original fans love her even more!
